description: §21.3 — an acyclic 2-file import graph (case.scrml imports fromA from a.scrml; a.scrml imports nothing back) resolves cleanly; E-IMPORT-002 stays silent.
rationale: §21.3: a directed acyclic import graph is legal. With a.scrml importing nothing from the entry there is no cycle, so E-IMPORT-002 must not fire — the clean twin of the circular case.
